titleStmt.title: SII 36.258: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 258. (A.R. No. 258 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Varāha Perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: Kulōttuṅga III. Year 35 and 139th day: A.D. 1214.

summary.p: Registers the royal order of the king, granting 109 kaḻañcu of gold to the temple of Mahāvishṇu at Tiruviḍavandai in Paḍuvūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Kalyāṇapuraṅgoṇḍachōḻa-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam for conducting monthly festivals on the occasion of Pūram nakshatram, the birth austerism of Kulōttuṅga III. The inscription gives a long list of officers including several levels of Adhikāris, Kaṇkānis, Varippottagam, Mugaveṭṭi and other functionaries, who acted in the issuance of the royal order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattuk kaliyāṇapuraṅkoṇṭacoḻak koṭṭattu paṭuvūr nāṭṭu tiruviṭavantai mahāviṣṇukruhattil tiruviṭavantai tevarkku nitta ciṟappukku Iṟaikaṭṭiṉapoṉ Ittevarkku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkut tevatāṉam Iṟuppatāka pukun=ta keḻvi variyiliṭṭatu yāṇṭu muppattañcāvatu nāḷ 9 10 1ṉāl pāṇṭiyaṉ talaiyuñ ceralaṉ cālaiyum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum koṇṭu kalliyāṇapurattu vicaiabhiṣegam paṇṇi vīrasimhāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiṉa kovirājakecari
paṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī vijaiyarājen=tiratevar kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa purattuk koyiliṉ Uḷḷālt tirumañcaṇacālait tāṉañ ceytaruḷā niṉṟu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu kaliyāṇapuraṅkoṇṭacoḻak koṭṭattu paṭuvūr nāṭṭu piramateya tiruviṭavantai tevarkku nittam ciṟappukku Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa poṉ 109 nūṟṟu Oṉpatu kaḻañcaraiyE nālu mañcāṭiyum poṉṉum Ūrkkaḻañcu kācum cekkiṟaiyum viṉiyokamum taṟiyun=tateṭṭār pāṭṭamuḷḷiṭṭa kīḻiṟaip pāṭṭam Uḷpaṭa tiruviṭavantait tevarkku nām piṟanta pūranāḷkaḷāl tiṅkaḷ toṟun tiruviḻā
vuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivan=taṅkaḷukku yāṇṭu muppattaiñcāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiili Āka variyiliṭṭuk kuṭukkavenṟu tiruvāy moḻin=taruḷināreṉṟu tiruman=tiraōlai nittavinota vaḷanāṭṭu kiḻāṟ kūṟṟattu vaikūrc ceriyuṭaiyāṉ mummuṭicoḻaṉ māṇikkanāṉa cempiyaṉ tamiḻataraiyaṉ Eḻuttinālum tiruman=tira Ōlaināyakam Uyyak koṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭuk keraḷān=takac caruppetimaṅkalattu nakkaṉ mārāyaṉ ciṅkaḷān=takanāṉa vicaiyarājen=tira brahmamarāyanum Arumoḻi vikkiramacoḻanāṉa vicaiyarāja mahāpalivāṇarājanum Arayaṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻanāṉa vicaiyarājen=tira Irukkai veḷānum Arayaṉ geruḍhavāhaṉanāṉa vicaiyarā
jen=tirak kāliṅkarācanum Arayaṉ Īśvaranāṉa vicaiyarājen=tira vannāṭu Uṭaiyārum Oppiṭṭup pukun=ta keḻvippaṭiye variyiliṭṭuk koḷkaveṉṟu nīlaṉ kuṭitāṅkiyārāṉa pallavarājarum vīrapattiraṉ tillaiviṭaṅkanārāṉa vicaiyarājen=tirap pottappi coḻarum Eva Ivarkaḷ Eviṉapaṭiye Uṭaṉkūṭṭattu Atikārikaḷ rājāśraya vaḷanāṭṭuc cempuṟaikkaṇṭattuk komākuṭaiyāṉ piccanātittanārāṉa vicaiyarājentra mūven=taveḷārum rājātirāja vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkai nāṭṭu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa nallūr kiḻavar pālaikūttanārāṉa kalliyāṇapuran=taka mūventa veḷārum rājarājap pāṇṭi nāṭṭu rājentracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭuk kīḻk kuṇṭāṟṟu coḻa cikāmaṇi nallūruṭaiyār kumāraṉ civacaraṇattārāṉa cempiyaṉ Anut
tira mūven=taveḷārum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu civapātacekara nallūruṭaiyār veḷāṉ nīlakaṇṭanārāṉa Irumuṭicoḻa mūven=taveḷārum Irājarāja pāṇṭi nāṭṭu miḻalai kūṟṟattu poṉpaṟṟi Uṭaiyār koṉ Ampalakkūttanārāṉa rājaviccātira mūven=taveḷārum vicaiya rājen=tira vaḷanāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai velūṟk kūṟṟattu paṉaṅkāṭu kuṭiyuṭaiyar caṭaiyaṉ puttanāraāṉa teṉṉavaṉ mūven=taveḷārum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viḷai nāṭṭu kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa nallūruṭaiyār veḷāṉ pakaiaṭakkiyārāṉa vaḷavaṉ mūven=taveḷārum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu rājadhirājak koṭṭattu Ākuṭi nāṭṭu Āyaṇṭampākkattu Iṟaiyveṭṭar kumaraṉ pācūrk kūttanārum nakkan maturāntakanārāna Āha
vamallakulān=taka mūven=taveḷārum Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu Anni Ūruṭaiyar nallataṭiyār Āṭavallāṉārāṉa pallavaṉ mūven=taveḷārum vicaiyarājen=tira vaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalak kūṟṟattu mummuṭicoḻa nallūr kiḻavar ciṅkāṉai puttanārāṉa teṉṉavaṉ mūven=taveḷārum Irājaādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvin=taḷūr nāṭṭuk kañcāṟaṉ catti tiruv(ā)ṭikaḷāraāṉa Uttamacoḻat tiruvin=taḷūr nāṭṭu mūven=taveḷārum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭuc ceṅkuṭi kiḻār kaliyaṉ Ātittanārum Irājen=tiracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭi Āṉmūr nāṭṭuk konūḻār pattanāpeṟṟārāṉa Aḻakiya rāja mūven=taveḷārum Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu Anniyūruṭaiyāṉ nallattaṭikaḷ ceṉ
nārāṉa tāṉatuṅka viḻupparaiyarum naṭuvirukkuṅ kṣatrayacikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu veḷā nāṭṭu rājen=tira coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu sāhaṇai Atirātrayāciyārum kalliyāṇapuraṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭut taniyūr rājadhirājac caruppetimaṅkalattu kaṟippuṟattu śrīmātava paṭṭarum Uppamkālcolaippaṭṭa somayāciyaārum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻac caruppeti maṅkalattu pacalaic cīrāma paṭṭarum viṭaiyatikārikaḷ rājamahen=tira mūven=taveḷārum kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa mūven=taveḷārum Arikulakecari mūven=taveḷārum nittavinota vaḷanāṭṭu Āvūrk kūṟṟattu Ālattūruṭaiyār tivākaraṉ niṉṟārāṉa vikkiramaciṅka mūven=taveḷārum vicaiyarājen=tira vaḷanāṭṭu puliyūṟ nāṭṭu pūṇṭiyuṭaiyār At
tāṇi kūttanārāṉa vāṉavaṉ mūven=taveḷārum karuppūruṭaiyār veḷāṉ tāyanārāṉa cempiyaṉ ceṅkiḷi nāṭṭu viḻupparaiyarum rājarājap pāṇṭi nāṭṭu maturān=taka vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakaraic cempil nāṭṭu Uttamacoḻa nallūr kiḻavar koṉ Aḻakiyapāṇṭiyanārāṉa vicaiya rājen=tirac cempil nāṭṭuk koṉārum villavaṉ coḻa viḻupparaiyarum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟumpūr nāṭṭu kūṟṟūr kiḻavar tāya nāṭāḻvārāṉa Ulakaḷan=tacoḻa mūven=taveḷārum kalliyāṇapuraṅkoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇik kūṟṟattu kuvaḷaiveliyuṭaiyār koyil cittanārāṉa rājādhirājap pallavaraiyarum neriyaṉ mūven=taveḷārum vīraviccātira mūven=taveḷārum kalliyāṇapuraṅkoṇṭacoḻa mūven=taveḷārum rājavalla mūven=taveḷārum naṭu
virukkum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Ēṟucevakak koṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻac caruppeti maṅkalattu yalūr śrī vāsudeva paṭṭac comayājiyārum rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭu miḻalai nāṭṭuk koṟṟamaṅkalattu paṟppanāpa paṭṭa comayāji yārum Ēvap puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷattuk kaṇkāṇi vicaiya rājen=tira vaḷanāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻaiveḷūr kūṟṟattu taṇakkuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭālakaṉ Ampalakkūttanāṉa Avani tivākara mūven=taveḷānum Arumulai kiḻāṉ nakkaṉ Ariyiliyanāṉa coḻakula cūḷāmaṇi mūven=taveḷānum pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu maṇalūr kiḻavaṉ kaṇapati Āṭavallānāṉa coḷen=tira cūḷāmaṇi mūven=taveḷānum maṇalūr kiḻavanum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu vicaiya rājen=tirak koṭṭattu māṅkāṭu nāṭṭu rājāśrayanallūrc ceṅkal kiḻāṉ kumaraṉ tiruveṅka
ṭamum puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷam vicaiya rājen=tira vaḷanāṭṭu muḻaikkāṭu nāṭṭuk karuṅkaṇṇi kiḻāṉ ri mātavanum rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvin=taḷūr nāṭṭup pūven=tiracoḻa nallūruṭaiyāṉ kovin=taṉ pūvanāṉa coḻakulamāṇikka mūven=taveḷānum Atirācarāja vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārūrk kūṟṟattu ṅ kuṭaiyāṉ varippottakam rājarājap pāṇṭi nāṭṭu muṉṉūṟṟu kūṟṟattup paḷḷamuṭaiyāṉ koṉ Iṭitāṅkiyārum Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu neṟkuppai Uṭaiyāṉ vattamāṉaṉ Ulokanātanum mukaveṭṭi jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu rājādhirājak koṭṭattu Ākuṭi nāṭṭu Āyaṇṭampāk kiḻāṉ kecuvaṉ muṭikoṇṭacoḻanum pakai meccikaṇṭa koṭṭattu maṇai
yil nāṭṭu ceñcināṅkoṟṟaṉ kaṭampaṉ tevakaḷcun=taranum tāyanallūruṭaiyāṉ Irāmaṉ cīruṭaikkaḻalum tumpūruṭaiyāṉ Arikaṇṭanātittanum variyiliṭu pukaiñceri Uṭaiyāṉ comaṉ celvanum kṣattriya pallava mūven=taveḷānum kṣatriyavarāśrayak koṭṭattu Āraṇinilai mummuṭicoḻa nallūr Iḷaiyūṟu kiḻavaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ veḷḷiyum varippottakak kaṇakku kañcāṟaṉ cūṟṟipaṭṭālakanum Ilaikkāṭu kiḻāṉ karuṇākaraṉ Āṭavallānum kocampākkiḻāṉ muttippiccanum paṭṭolai kalaiyaṉpāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ caṅkikūttanum maṇaṟpākkiḻāṉ kaṇṭarāccaṉ kampanum kīḻmukaveṭṭi jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu rājādhirājak koṭṭattu Ampattūr nāṭṭu nuḷappiyaṟukiḻāṉ camuttiraṉ tevaṭiyum Añcaṉavaṇṇa
ṉ kuṟṟālanum vācitta varippottakam neṟkuppai Uṭaiyānum variyiliṭṭa terippu rājādhirājak koṭṭattu Ākuṭi nāṭṭu Āyaṇṭampākkamuṭaiyāṉ ciṅkaṉ cūṟṟiyum paṭṭolai Eḻutiṉa kīḻtterippu vallaṅkiḻāṉ ciṅkaṉ tillaikkaraicum variyiliṭuvitta puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam coḻakulamāṇikka mūven=taveḷānum Āyaṇṭampākkiḻānum Iruntu yāṇṭu muppattañcāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟu muppattoṉpatuṉāl variyiliṭṭatu Ivai puravuvari tiṇakkaḷam coḻakulamāṇikka mūven=taveḷā neḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
